title: Emission Control Failure Diagnostic Table by DTC

blocks.text: Fuel, Emission Control Failure Diagnostic Table by DTC

rows.text: SAE DTC (PGM-FI warning light) (Number of blinks)
PGM-FI warning light Lights on or off
P2 relief valve control SOL.V. circuit voltage low
P2 relief valve control SOL.V. drive circuit failure
Intake air temperature sensor 2 voltage low
Intake air temperature sensor 2 voltage high
Intake air pressure sensor voltage low
Intake air pressure sensor voltage low
Intake air pressure sensor voltage high
Intake air pressure sensor voltage high
Intake air temperature sensor voltage low
Intake air temperature sensor voltage low
Intake air temperature sensor voltage high
Intake air temperature sensor voltage high
Secondary O 2 Sensor Heater circuit abnormal
Fuel supply unit air-fuel ratio thin
Fuel supply unit air-fuel ratio density
West gate control SOL.V. circuit failure
No. 1 cylinder ignition primary circuit failure
No. 2 cylinder ignition primary circuit failure
No. 3 Cylinder ignition primary circuit failure
Backup memory power supply (VBUM) voltage low
ECU internal circuit error (Transmission CPU/Sub CPU)
Starter relay drive circuit voltage low
Starter relay drive circuit voltage high
Sensor power supply A circuit failure
Sensor power supply B circuit failure
ECU power circuit/internal circuit abnormal (power supply system)
Voltage stabilizer (DCDC) start signal line failure
LAF sensor AFS pin voltage high
DBW power supply relay circuit abnormal (ON failure)
DBW power supply relay circuit abnormal (OFF failure)
A.C. generator B terminal voltage low
Gas pedal Pedal Position Sensor 1 voltage low
Gas pedal Pedal Position Sensor 1 voltage high
Gas pedal Pedal Position Sensor 2 voltage low
Gas pedal Pedal Position Sensor 2 voltage high
Accelerator pedal position Sensor 1/2 correlation error
Throttle actuator Idle position learning error
Radiator water temperature sensor voltage low
Radiator water temperature sensor voltage high
Atmospheric pressure sensor circuit communication error
LAF sensor AFS + terminal voltage low
LAF sensor AFS - low terminal voltage
LAF sensor Abnormal lean range characteristics
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU reception failure (BUS-OFF))
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-VSA modulator control unit communication failure)
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-EPS control unit communication failure)
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-SRS unit communication failure)
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-Combination Meter Control Unit communication failure)
F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-Smart Power Control Unit communication failure)
*1: Models equipped with a turbo charger *2: Vehicles not equipped with a turbo charger

SAE DTC: DTC code displayed on HDS, which is in accordance with SAE (Society of Automotive Engineers of America) standards. Number of times the PGM-FI warning light blinks: Applies to the number of times the PGM-FI warning light blinks when the SCS is shorted, and the last 4 digits of the SAE DTC code are displayed on the meter for those without an indication.

The D indicator light may blink at the same time as the PGM-FI warning light comes on. In this case, diagnose the PGM-FI system malfunction and then check the D indicator light blinking again; if the D indicator light continues to blink, diagnose the CVT system malfunction.
